data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes decision time for users by reducing the number of choices presented at once.
data.technical_spec: Intuitive layout and navigation, progressive disclosure techniques.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interfaces are designed for efficiency, placing frequently used elements within easy reach.
data.technical_spec: Button size proportionality and element placement optimization.

data.title: Consistency Principle
data.description: Maintains uniformity in design and behavior across platforms enhancing familiar user experiences.
data.technical_spec: Standardized design frameworks like Fluent Design System.

data.title: Feedback Principle
data.description: Provides immediate feedback for user actions to keep experiences engaging and informative.
data.technical_spec: Interactive elements with hover states, loading indicators for delayed actions.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Accommodates user's cognitive load by keeping information processing in manageable chunks.
data.technical_spec: Uses bullet points, headings, and visual hierarchies.
